title: DIMCP EP_27 NoChilisDay
archivePath: CRFW Archive/_Documentation/Videos/2018/Dog is my Copilot/DIMCP EP_27 NoChilisDay.mp4
transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Here we are back on the show. Dog is my co-pilot DIMCP.
[00:00:08.32] Delivery dog is on his way back from delivering a plate of hot chicken to H.I.G.
[00:00:19.04] How's it going? It's not good. Here we do the chilean delivery. I don't know.
[00:00:26.64] My heart is still crushed, absolutely destroyed. I lost my other sunglasses.
[00:00:33.52] They were absolutely reflective. They were crushed brand. They were 99 cents.
[00:00:41.12] Some fucking millennial, pure person needs a plate of chilies, I guess.
[00:00:51.12] I skipped it. Oh thank god. Fucking shit.
